task_completion.description: Access the 'E-Commerce Platform' project in OpenProject
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject web interface is visible, showing the 'E-Commerce Platform' project dashboard or work packages list.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Search & Discovery Epic' work package
task_completion.visual_evidence: A work package with the subject 'Search & Discovery Epic' is visible in the work packages list or its detail view.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Checkout & Payments Epic' work package
task_completion.visual_evidence: A work package with the subject 'Checkout & Payments Epic' is visible in the work packages list or its detail view.

task_completion.description: Assign the specified children to 'Search & Discovery Epic'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work packages list (in hierarchy view) or the 'Relations' tab shows 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch', 'Implement product recommendation engine', and 'Design new product page layout' as children of 'Search & Discovery Epic'.

task_completion.description: Assign the specified child to 'Checkout & Payments Epic'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work packages list (in hierarchy view) or the 'Relations' tab shows 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' as a child of 'Checkout & Payments Epic'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenProject web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and OpenProject UI, rather than terminal API/curl commands.

integrity.description: The hierarchy is established within the OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parent-child relationships are visible in the OpenProject work packages table or detail views, not just written in a text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing PostgreSQL queries or Rails console commands modifying work packages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project identifier is 'ecommerce-platform'. The two epics to be created are exactly 'Search & Discovery Epic' and 'Checkout & Payments Epic'. The 'Search & Discovery Epic' must be the parent of 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch', 'Implement product recommendation engine', and 'Design new product page layout'. The 'Checkout & Payments Epic' must be the parent of 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari'. Note: 'Design new product page layout' may not exist initially and might need to be created by the agent.
